mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.usage_date, '%Y-%m') AS yearMonth, COALESCE(SUM(d.total_usage_data), 0) AS usedAmount FROM DAILY_TOTAL_DATA d WHERE d.line_id = #{lineId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.usage_date >= DATE_SUB( STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{month}, '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH ) AND d.usage_date < DATE_ADD( STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{month}, '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH ) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(d.usage_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth DESC

SELECT a.application_name AS appName, COALESCE(SUM(d.total_usage_data), 0) AS usedAmount FROM DAILY_APP_TOTAL_DATA d INNER JOIN APPLICATION a ON a.application_id = d.application_id WHERE d.line_id = #{lineId} AND d.usage_date >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{month}, '01'), '%Y%m%d') AND d.usage_date < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{month}, '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY a.application_id, a.application_name ORDER BY usedAmount DESC

SELECT u.user_name AS userName, fl.role AS role, f.pool_remaining_data AS sharedDataRemaining, l.remaining_data AS personalDataRemaining, p.plan_name AS planName FROM LINE l JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id AND f.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COALESCE(fsu.shared_used, 0) AS sharedPoolUsedAmount, COALESCE(dtd.total_used, 0) - COALESCE(fsu.shared_used, 0) AS personalUsedAmount, p.basic_data_amount AS personalTotalAmount, f.pool_total_data AS sharedPoolTotalAmount FROM LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id AND f.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT line_id, SUM(usage_amount) AS shared_used FROM FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND usage_date >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d') AND usage_date < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY line_id ) fsu ON fsu.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT line_id, SUM(total_usage_data) AS total_used FROM DAILY_TOTAL_DATA WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND usage_date >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d') AND usage_date < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY line_id ) dtd ON dtd.line_id = l.line_id WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL
